programme.desc: India v Afghanistan. Coverage of the third ODI in the three-match series, which takes place at M. A. Chidambaram Stadium in Chennai. The visitors haven't beat India in any of the four completed ODI's between the two sides, with the hosts winning three and the other ending in a thrilling tie in 2018.
